Visioner ‼️ 🇨🇳 🇹🇼 BREAKING | According Wall Street Journal, China quietly blocked off huge chunks of airspace off its east coast for ~40 days (Mar 27–May 6) — much longer than its usual few-day military-style airspace closures — without saying why. The zones are off China’s coast near the Yellow Sea / East China Sea, not right next to Taiwan. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet

WarTranslated Lavrov spoke by phone with Iran’s foreign minister Abbas Araghchi, Russia’s Foreign Ministry says. They called for an end to what they described as reckless attacks on industrial and energy sites, including the Bushehr nuclear plant. Earlier today, Zelensky said Russia gave Iran intelligence on roughly 50 to 53 Israeli energy sites and helped it strike civilian infrastructure. tweet

OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump claimed in a several-minute-long phone interview this morning with Axios that the United States is “in deep and intense negotiations” with Iran and that a deal can be reached before his deadline expires on Tuesday. Trump stated, “The negotiations are going well, but you never get to the finish line with the Iranians,” adding that, “There is a good chance, but if they don't make a deal, I am blowing up everything over there.” tweet

WarTranslated Hungarian opposition candidate Peter Magyar accused Orban of staging the gas pipeline provocation with help from Serbia and Russia. He says the move was meant to fuel panic ahead of next week’s election. Orban claims explosives were found on the gas pipeline between Serbia and Hungary. He says an emergency defense council meeting has been called. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2040714695468896509/photo/1 - WarTranslated tweet

Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump says, that if an Iran deal is not made by his Tuesday deadline, "I am blowing up everything over there!" — Axios tweet

WarTranslated Ukraine flatly rejects any link to the explosives incident near TurkStream in Serbia, Foreign Ministry spokesman Heorhii Tykhyi said. He says it was most likely a Russian false flag tied to Moscow’s interference in Hungary’s election. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2040815033391645064/photo/1 Hungary says the alleged sabotage attempt on the Serbian section of TurkStream was an attack on its sovereignty, since it gets most of its Russian fuel through that route, Peter Szijjarto says. - WarTranslated tweet

Trump said the U.S. and Iran were close to talks, but pulled back over delays: “But then they said they will meet us in five days. So I said, ‘Why five days?’ I felt they were not being serious. So I attacked the bridge.” Source: Axios
Trump to Axios: The negotiations are going well, but you never get to the finish line with the Iranians.
Trump to Axios: People of Iran are afraid we are gonna leave in the middle of the war, but we are not going to leave.

Trump told Axios the U.S. is in “deep negotiations” with Iran and a deal could happen before Tuesday, but warned of major escalation if it fails. “There is a good chance, but if they don't make a deal, I am blowing up everything over there.”

↩️ Reply to OSINT OSINTdefender Potential Russian-backed false flag currently underway in Hungary. 💥 What we’ve all feared is happening: Hungarian Russia expert András Rácz wrote three days ago about a potential Russia-backed false flag attack in Serbia targeting the gas pipeline to Hungary. The same information had already reached multiple journalists, including myself, weeks earlier, from sources connected to Hungarian government circles. Now Viktor Orbán has announced that Serbian president Aleksandar Vučić informed him about “explosives of devastating power” found at the gas pipeline connecting the two countries. Orbán and his propaganda machine are already amplifying the news everywhere, with the prime minister convening his security cabinet. It remains unclear what measures the government might take using this alleged false flag operation as a pretext. But if the second part of the information we received also proves true, Orbán could declare a state of emergency, significantly affecting the election campaign—which he is currently losing—and potentially disrupting the organization of the April 12 election. The opposition Tisza Party has been widening its lead to 15–20 points, if not more. Orbán accuses them of being "Ukrainian agents" for months. His propaganda would very soon link the Serbian false-flag both to Ukraine and the Tisza Party, I have no doubts about that. I encourage all foreign reporters covering the Hungarian election to pay close attention and not fall for the government’s propaganda or the narratives pushed by its pundits on the Orbán government payroll, including here on X. The situation could soon be very serious. - Szabolcs Panyi tweet

Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 BREAKING | FOX News reports that the CIA has confirmed the identity of the downed F-15 crew member; there were concerns that it could have been an Iranian trap. “Within 8 hours, we had aircraft in motion. Within roughly 12 hours, we were already on the ground in Iran.” The CIA conducted a deception operation, leaking false information about a maritime exfiltration in order to draw Iranian forces away from the area where the downed F-15 crew member was located; officials say the strategy was effective. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet

🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 This is a map of Iran superimposed over the United States, since some people seem to struggle with grasping just how large the country is. The other image shows Iran’s terrain. Hopefully this adds a bit of perspective for those saying “muh… Iran can’t even cover their airspace.” Iran is roughly the size of Alaska, about 2.5 times the size of Texas, and spans nearly one-sixth of the U.S. land area. And for our American friends: That’s about ~68.7 million Walmart Supercenters, ~150 trillion Big Macs, or roughly ~300 billion F-150s parked side by side (no spacing) 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
